sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle"> <x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <city>Birmingham</city> <country>Great Britain</country> <description>ultrices posuere cubilia curae mauris viverra diam vitae quam suspendisse potenti nullam porttitor lacus at turpis donec posuere</description> <end_date>1967-12-20</end_date> <make>Morris</make> <model>Mini-Minor</model> <pin>9904</pin> <start_date>1963-08-03</start_date> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-02-17 05:43:35</sys_created_on> <sys_id>01bf07a6fd8b32107f44b9211467fe91</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 05:43:35</sys_updated_on> <vin>WAUPFAFMXBA262342</vin> <year>1963</year> </x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle> </record_update>
